name: Arachne / Spider Girl TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, Mental Change, Spiders)
When you awaken in the darkness of an abandoned library, you find yourself feeling a lot creepier and crawlier than before- and you feel this urge to trap prey in your webs...
What will you do? The humans will think you're a monster. Do you play into the role, or prove them wrong? The latter may be difficult, with all these spidery instincts tempting you...
creator: Orbital_Lithium
